name: Now Playing
author: grimmdev
description: Shows what's currently playing across all active Jellyfin sessions as a live ticker in the header. Polls every 15 seconds and updates instantly on playback events. Requires the server mod for session data.

vars.name: Instance Label
vars.description: Label returned by the /sessions endpoint. Useful if you run multiple Jellyfin servers.

vars.name: Poll Interval (ms)
vars.description: How often the browser ticker refreshes session data. Default is 15000 (15 seconds). Minimum recommended: 5000.

vars.name: Show Username
vars.description: When enabled, the ticker also shows the username next to the currently playing title.
